name: progress-ring
title: Progress Ring
author: Parable
description: A circular SVG progress ring whose rounded-cap gradient arc (violet → fuchsia) sweeps to its value by transitioning stroke-dashoffset in pure CSS over a dim track, with a centred percentage or custom label and real progressbar/aria-value semantics. Under prefers-reduced-motion the sweep is disabled and the ring draws statically at its final value.
